title: Meta Ad Creative Designer Needed (Restaurant Campaign) – 12 Static Ad Mockups Needed Within 24 Hours
brief: Project Overview I am looking for an experienced Meta/Facebook Ad Creative Designer who understands direct-response advertising and restaurant marketing. I need a total of 12 static image ad mockups created within 24 hours for a Mexican restaurant client. The ads do NOT need to be launched. These are mockups that will be presented to the client for approval before campaign launch. You will be provided: * Restaurant website * Instagram page * Brand assets (if available) * Offer details * Creative direction Your job is to create professional Facebook and Instagram feed ad mockups that demonstrate how the campaigns will look once launched. --- About The Client The client is a family-owned authentic Mexican restaurant located in West Palm Beach, Florida. The restaurant serves a multicultural audience with a strong Hispanic customer base and is known for authentic Mexican food made fresh from scratch. The brand personality is: * Authentic * Community-focused * Family-oriented * Warm * Bold * Local neighborhood favorite This should NOT feel like a corporate chain restaurant. Deliverables: Create a total of 12 static ad mockups. A) Offer #1: Taco Tuesday - (3 Creative Concepts) Goal: Drive Tuesday traffic and make Tuesday the busiest day of the week. Creative Direction: * Strong food photography * Weekly recurring promotion feel * Urgency * Clear offer presentation * Eye-catching scrolling stop power B) Offer #2: Lunch Specials - (3 Creative Concepts) Goal: Drive lunch traffic betwe
